items.title: Haaland Downplays Norway’s World Cup Chances Before England Clash
items.summary: Erling Haaland called Norway’s World Cup chances “really low" despite scoring seven goals and leading his country to a quarterfinal matchup against England.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: France cruise into semi-finals - could this be the best Les Bleus ever?
items.summary: World Cup winners in 1998 and 2018, France have created another special team and in beating Morocco showed why they are favourites to win the 2026 competition.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Melbourne Renegades BBL team leave Marvel Stadium after 15 years
items.summary: The MCG will become their official home venue although it's understood they will host two games at Junction Oval
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
